doc_title: Semantically Conditioned LSTM-based Natural Language Generation for Spoken Dialogue Systems

items.evidence_span: As noted in Stent et al. (2005)
The most common and widely adopted today is the rule-based (or template-based) approach (Cheyer and Guzzoni, 2007;
The trainable generator approach exemplified by the HALOGEN (Langkilde and Knight, 1998)
or reproduce certain style (Mairesse and Walker, 2011).
Wen et al., 2015) have received attention as access to data becomes increasingly available.
dialogues collected from a previous user trial (Gašić et al., 2015)
